attributes.description: AWS ELB metrics dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] ELB Metrics

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS ELB load balancers across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by load balancer at the top. Spot elevated 5xx, backend errors, and unhealthy hosts in the summary table then click any load balancer to drill down.
To get started, configure CloudWatch metric streams for your ELB load balancers with the Elastic agent.

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancer count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Distinct load balancers observed in each dashboard time bucket, classified by target 5xx errors and target health.

attributes.title: Load balancer count over time
attributes.description: Distinct load balancers observed in each dashboard time bucket, classified by target 5xx errors and target health.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS total = COUNT(*), erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring", degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "degraded", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS total = COUNT(*), erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring", degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "degraded", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Load Balancers
embeddableConfig.description: Per-LB summary table over the selected time range. Requests and processed bytes use Sum statistics; target 5xx uses HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count; rejected connections use the Maximum statistic; latency uses Average/Maximum TargetResponseTime.

attributes.title: Load Balancers
attributes.description: Per-LB summary table over the selected time range. Requests and processed bytes use Sum statistics; target 5xx uses HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count; rejected connections use the Maximum statistic; latency uses Average/Maximum TargetResponseTime.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_inv = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0), c_rejected_count = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_dur_avg = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)), c_dur_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)), c_requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), c_processed_bytes = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)), c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_err > 0, 1, c_rejected_count > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_err > 0, "erroring", c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_inv = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0), c_rejected_count = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_dur_avg = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)), c_dur_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)), c_requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), c_processed_bytes = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)), c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_err > 0, 1, c_rejected_count > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_err > 0, "erroring", c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancers by health
embeddableConfig.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

attributes.title: Load balancers by health
attributes.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE( be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy > 0, "degraded", healthy > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE( be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy > 0, "degraded", healthy > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

embeddableConfig.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(region/load-balancer)`).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS lbs = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(cloud.region), "/", TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)))
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS lbs = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(cloud.region), "/", TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)))

attributes.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(region/load-balancer)`).

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) in the selected time range — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the `Load balancers by health` pie.

attributes.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) in the selected time range — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the `Load balancers by health` pie.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket of the pie.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

attributes.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket of the pie.

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers reporting metrics but no healthy / unhealthy hosts and no errors (`lb_state == "idle"` bucket of the pie). Expected for newly-provisioned or quiescent LBs.

attributes.description: Load balancers reporting metrics but no healthy / unhealthy hosts and no errors (`lb_state == "idle"` bucket of the pie). Expected for newly-provisioned or quiescent LBs.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "idle"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "idle"

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS requests_total = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS requests_total = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS processed_bytes_total = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL))

embeddableConfig.title: Requests (+) / target 5xx (−) over time
embeddableConfig.description: Stacked over time: positive = total RequestCount; negative = target 5xx responses.

attributes.title: Requests (+) / target 5xx (−) over time
attributes.description: Stacked over time: positive = total RequestCount; negative = target 5xx responses.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), errors = -1 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), errors = -1 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS client_errors = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`, NULL)), server_errors = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS client_errors = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`, NULL)), server_errors = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT invocations DESC | LIMIT 10

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS avg_latency_s = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT avg_latency_s DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS avg_latency_s = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT avg_latency_s DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS rejected = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY ts = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT ts ASC

embeddableConfig.title: ELB load balancers — hexagon map (click a hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per ELB load balancer, ordered worst-first with target 5xx errors or degraded target health first. Toggle Color by between Status, Target 5xx errors, or Target Response Time; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for latency over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that load balancer.

savedVis.title: ELB load balancers — hexagon map
savedVis.description: One hexagon per ELB load balancer, ordered worst-first with target 5xx errors or degraded target health first. Toggle Color by between Status, Target 5xx errors, or Target Response Time; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for latency over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that load balancer.

Toggle Color by between Status, Target 5xx errors, or Target Response Time; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for latency over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that load balancer.","usermeta":{"x_elb_hexmap":true},"padding":{"top":10,"left":10,"right":10,"bottom":15},"data":[{"name":"ts_probe","url":{"%type%":"esql","%context%":true,"%timefield%":"@timestamp","query":"ROW STATS errors_sum = SUM(CASE(stat == \"Sum\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), throttles_total = MAX(CASE(stat == \"Maximum\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), invocations_total = MAX(CASE(stat == \"Maximum\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), duration_min = MIN(CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) WHERE CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL) IS NOT NULL, duration_max = MAX(CASE(stat == \"Maximum\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) WHERE CASE(stat == \"Maximum\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL) IS NOT NULL, duration_avg = AVG(CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) WHERE CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL) IS NOT NULL, duration_last = LAST(CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL), @timestamp) WHERE CASE(stat == \"Average\", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL) IS NOT NULL BY entity_id = LoadBalancer, cloud.region | EVAL status_num = CASE(errors_sum > 0, 0, throttles_total > 0, 1, invocations_total > 0, 2, 3), status_label = CASE(errors_sum > 0, \"erroring\", throttles_total > 0, \"degraded\", invocations_total > 0, \"healthy\", \"idle\"), severity_rank = CASE(errors_sum > 0, 0, throttles_total > 0, 1, invocations_total > 0, 2, 3), round_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(?_tstart), \"|\", TO_STRING(?_tend)), fetched_at = NOW() | KEEP entity_id, status_num, status_label, severity_rank, errors_sum, duration_min, duration_max, duration_avg, duration_last, round_key, fetched_at | LIMIT 10000"}},{"name":"ranked_status","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["severity_rank","entity_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_errors_sum","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.errors_sum
